templateMetadata.description: Measure lead quality by tracking conversion from Marketing Qualified Lead (MQL) to Sales Qualified Lead (SQL)
templateMetadata.audience: Marketing Operations, Demand Generation, Sales Enablement
templateMetadata.useCase: Track lead quality, identify high-performing campaigns, optimize MQL criteria
prerequisites: MQL_Date__c field on Contact object (Date field)
SQL_Date__c field on Contact object (Date field)

reportMetadata.name: MQL to SQL Conversion - {Period}
reportMetadata.description: MQL to SQL conversion rate with days-to-convert metrics

reportFilters.customizationNote: Filter to MQLs created in target period
Only include contacts that reached MQL stage

groupingsDown.customizationNote: Can group by Campaign, Campaign Type, or other segment

aggregates.name: Contact.SQL_Date__c
aggregates.description: Total SQLs (count of non-null SQL dates)
aggregates.note: This counts contacts with SQL_Date populated

aggregates.name: Contact.Days_to_SQL__c
aggregates.description: Average days from MQL to SQL

customSummaryFormulas.name: MQL_to_SQL_Conversion_Rate
customSummaryFormulas.description: Percentage of MQLs that became SQLs
customSummaryFormulas.note: Create as custom summary formula in report builder

customSummaryFormulas.name: Median_Days_to_SQL
customSummaryFormulas.description: Median time to convert MQL to SQL
customSummaryFormulas.note: Requires calculating in report or using Einstein Analytics

calculatedFieldsRequired.description: Number of days from MQL to SQL
True if contact reached MQL stage
True if contact reached SQL stage

steps: 1. Create MQL_Date__c and SQL_Date__c date fields on Contact (if not exists)
3. Verify Lead Source picklist has values populated
4. Update date range filter to target period
5. Deploy report to Marketing Reports folder
6. Create custom summary formula for conversion rate in report builder
